title: 2BHK · 100 Ft Road
address: 100 Ft Road, Near Toit, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: Premium 2BHK flat available for rent on 100 Ft Road. Excellent ventilation, semi-furnished with modular kitchen, wardrobes, and geysers. Strictly for families or working professionals. Safe gated building with security.

title: 2BHK · 12th Main
address: 12th Main Road, HAL 2nd Stage, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: Lovely 2BHK flat located in the heart of Indiranagar on 12th Main. East facing, 1st floor, with covered car parking. Walking distance to Metro station, restaurants, and shopping centers.

title: 2BHK · CMH Road
address: CMH Road, Near Metro Station, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: Spacious and elegant 2 BHK apartment near Indiranagar Metro Station. 24 hours water supply, power backup, lifts, and security. Perfect for daily commuters. Rent is slightly negotiable.

title: 2BHK · Jeevan Bima Nagar
address: Jeevan Bima Nagar Main Road, Bangalore
description: Standard 2BHK flat in Jeevan Bima Nagar. Clean surroundings, peaceful residential colony. Built-in cupboards, immediate occupancy available. Deposit is reasonable.

title: 2BHK · HAL 2nd Stage
description: 2BHK apartment in quiet, tree-lined lane of HAL 2nd stage. Covered bike parking, 1st floor, no lift. Reliable borewell water, separate electricity meter.

title: 2BHK · Domlur border
description: Cozy 2BHK near Domlur border. Ideal for tech professionals working in EGL (Embassy GolfLinks) or Indiranagar. Unfurnished but very neat. No security guard.

title: 2BHK · "Prime Indiranagar"
description: Beautiful 2BHK flat in Prime Indiranagar area. Extremely cheap rent because owner needs to rent it out urgently this week. Modern amenities included. First come first served.

title: 2BHK · "Spacious, near metro"
description: Fully furnished 2BHK, 1150sqft, just 2 minutes walking distance from Indiranagar Metro Station. Rent is 22k only! Safe environment, no broker fee, direct owner contact.

title: 2BHK · "Owner going abroad"
address: HAL 3rd Stage, Near Metro, Indiranagar, Bangalore
description: Luxurious 2 BHK apartment. Owner going abroad, hence renting out very cheap. Rent ₹18,000 only! Modular kitchen, AC, leather sofas, high speed wifi. Fully loaded luxury. Please pay a minor refundable token to reserve and hold the flat. WhatsApp me directly at the number to visit. No calls.

title: 2BHK · "Urgent, token to hold"
description: Urgent listing! Beautiful 2BHK flat in the posh Defence Colony. Only ₹16,000 rent. Direct dealing. Need to pay token amount of ₹5,000 to hold this flat today as there is a huge queue. Very urgent.

title: 1BHK · Affordable Studio
description: Cozy and affordable 1 BHK studio apartment. Semi-furnished, walking distance to shops. Safe and secure locality, CCTV installed.

title: 3BHK · Luxury Penthouse
description: Stunning 3 BHK penthouse apartment with huge private terrace. Semi-furnished, top class marble flooring, modular kitchen, chimney, wardrobes in all rooms. 2 reserved car parking spaces.

title: 2BHK · Whitefield TechPark
description: Lovely 2BHK flat in Whitefield. Close to ITPL, school and hospitals. Perfect for techies working in Whitefield area.

title: 2BHK · Koramangala Cozy
description: Cosy 2 BHK apartment in prime Koramangala 4th block. Walking distance to Wipro park, restaurants and pubs. Semi-furnished, gated community.
